#
# Curated terminal list for jinxed virtual terminfo database.
#
# Uses ncurses primary (base) names. Aliases are auto-generated into
# jinxed/terminfo/_aliases.py by codegen_terminfo.py.
#
# Modern terminal types are extracted even if they differ only slightly from
# xterm-256color.  The codegen automatically detects near-clones and generates
# derived (inheriting) files instead of full copies.
#
xterm-256color
xterm
xterm-16color
linux
linux-16color
cons25
vt220
screen
screen-256color
tmux
tmux-256color
rxvt-unicode
rxvt-unicode-256color
rxvt
rxvt-256color
putty
putty-256color
st
st-256color
ansi
kitty
ghostty
rio
wezterm
contour
alacritty
dtterm
foot
hpterm
iris-ansi
sun
vt100
vt102
vt320
wy50
